stemHtml: A pilot lands at an airfield other than the destination specified in the flight plan. When must he/she inform the ATC unit at the original destination? Within…

options.a: 60 minutes of the original destination ETA.
options.b: 30 minutes of the original destination ETA.
options.c: 45 minutes of the original destination ETA.
options.d: 25 minutes of the original destination ETA.
